items.title: Blue Lock
items.description:
After a disastrous defeat at the 2018 World Cup, Japan's team struggles to regroup. But what's missing? An absolute Ace Striker, who can guide them to the win. The Japan Football Union is hell-bent on creating a striker who hungers for goals and thirsts for victory, and who can be the decisive instrument in turning around a losing match...and to do so, they've gathered 300 of Japan's best and brightest youth players. Who will emerge to lead the team...and will they be able to out-muscle and out-ego everyone who stands in their way?

(Source: Kodansha USA)

Note: Winner of the 45th Kodansha Manga Award in the Shounen Category in 2021.

items.title: One-Punch Man
items.description:
In this new action-comedy, everything about a young man named Saitama screams "AVERAGE,” from his lifeless expression, to his bald head, to his unimpressive physique. However, this average-looking fellow doesn't have your average problem... He's actually a superhero that's looking for tough opponents! The problem is, every time he finds a promising candidate he beats the snot out of them in one punch. Can Saitama finally find an evil villain strong enough to challenge him? Follow Saitama through his hilarious romps as he searches for new bad guys to challenge!

(Source: VIZ Media)

items.title: Kingdom
items.description:
Xin is a war orphan in a poor village in the kingdom of Qin. He has big dreams of becoming a great general, and when his best friend’s life is cut short by political machinations, Xin sets off to find a deposed ruler and help restore his place on the throne, while working his way up through the ranks of the Qin kingdom’s army to do what no one has ever done before—unify China.

(Source: VIZ Media)

items.title: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
items.description: The stage is set on a volcanic island in the Pacific Ocean, Hawaii. Jodio Joestar, a young boy living on Oahu Island, harbors the ambition to become a great millionaire. The clue to his goal lies in reaching the pinnacle of the mechanisms of this world. What means will he choose to achieve his objective?

items.title: Haimiya Is Scary Cute
items.description:
At my high school, everyone fears Haimiya-senpai. With her sharp piercings, striking grey wolf-cut, and that brutally honest Kansai dialect, she has a reputation for being downright terrifying. Yet, for some mysterious reason...this intimidating upperclassman is kind and gentle only to me! The curtain rises upon this heart-fluttering romantic comedy about a terrifying-yet-sweet senpai!

(Source: Manga UP!)

items.title: WITCHRIV
items.description:
A girl named Nona lives in plain sight among humans, hiding her true identity as a mage as she spends her days in peace with her best friend Lovi. But one day, Nona uses magic to fix Lovi's glasses and subsequently catches the attention of the Bureau of Magic Surveillance. A simple good deed becomes the trigger that sets Nona's destiny in motion...

(Source: MANGA Plus)

items.title: We're J-Just Childhood Friends
items.description:
Yuichi and Sumi were childhood friends who were always together. However, as they grew up, they drifted apart, but a chance encounter brings them back into each other’s lives…

(Source: Manga Plus)

items.title: Yotaka Futatabi
items.description:
That woman is "Yotaka." Once famous in the underworld as the strongest assassin, she is now a 33-year-old (and very unlucky) drug addict and alcoholic. She's enjoying her unemployed life in a rundown apartment. ♪ With her mind and body completely slack, Yotaka receives an invitation from her assassin friend, "Kohai," to return to active duty...!!

Will she return to the battlefield once again?! Yotaka!!!

(Source: Kodansha, translated)
